wins: Strong capital position with CET1 ratio of 11.3%
Significant share repurchases totaling $15.6 billion in the first 3 quarters
Growth in credit card portfolio with balances growing for 13 consecutive quarters
Efficiency initiatives leading to expense declines
risks: Commercial loan demand remains weak due to economic uncertainty
Commercial real estate office portfolio still expects additional charge-offs
Deposit pricing adjustments in response to Fed rate cuts
Uncertainty around the economic outlook and election impact
Potential impact from outstanding litigation and regulatory matters
